= the_modules_and_globals\n    local_vars = locals()\n    return eval(s,global_vars,local_vars)\n\ndef exec_string(s):\n    global the_modules_and_globals\n    global_vars = the_modules_and_globals\n    local_vars = locals()\n    return exec(s,global_vars,local_vars)\n\ndef py_nth(s,nth):\n    return s[nth]\n\ndef identity(s):\n    return s\n\ndef get_globals():\n    return globals()\n\ndef merge_modules_and_globals():\n    # Get all currently loaded modules\n    loaded_modules = sys.modules\n\n    # Get all global variables\n    global_vars = globals()\n\n    # Prepare a combined dictionary\n    global the_modules_and_globals\n    combined_dict = the_modules_and_globals\n    if combined_dict is None:\n        combined_dict = {}\n\n    # Add modules with a prefix or special key to distinguish them\n    for mod_name, mod_obj in loaded_modules.items():\n        combined_dict[f"module_{mod_name}"] = mod_obj\n        combined_dict[f"{mod_name}"] = mod_obj\n\n    # Add global variables with a prefix or special key\n    for var_name, var_value in global_vars.items():\n        combined_dict[f"global_{var_name}"] = var_value\n        combined_dict[f"{var_name}"] = var_value\n\n    the_modules_and_globals = combined_dict\n    return combined_dict\n\ndef get_locals():\n    return locals()\n\ndef iter_collection(s):\n    return iter(s)\n\ndef string_conversion(s):\n    return str(s)\n\ndef string_representation(s):\n    return repr(s)\n\ndef py_len(s):\n    return len(s)\n\ndef py_list(s):\n    return list(s)\n\ndef py_dict(s):\n    return dict(s)\n\ndef py_dict0():\n    return dict()\n\ndef py_map(s):\n    return map(s)\n\ndef py_tuple(s):\n    return tuple(s)\n\ndef py_set(s):\n    return set(s)\n\ndef absolute_value(num):\n    return abs(num)\n\ndef all_true(iterable):\n    return all(iterable)\n\ndef any_true(iterable):\n    return any(iterable)\n\ndef as_ascii(s):\n    return ascii(s)\n\ndef binary_conversion(num):\n    return bin(num)\n\ndef boolean_conversion(val):\n    return bool(val)\n\ndef chr_conversion(num):\n    return chr(num)\n\ndef hexadecimal_conversion(num):\n    return hex(num)\n\ndef octal_conversion(num):\n    return oct(num)\n\n# Arithmetic and Conversion\ndef int_conversion(s):\n    return int(s)\n\ndef float_conversion(s):\n    return float(s)\n\ndef complex_conversion(real, imag=0):\n    return complex(real, imag)\n\ndef divmod_func(a, b):\n    return divmod(a, b)\n\ndef pow_func(base, exp):\n    return pow(base, exp)\n\n# Collection Handling\ndef sorted_iterable(iterable, key=None, reverse=False):\n    return sorted(iterable, key=key, reverse=reverse)\n\ndef sum_iterable(iterable, start=0):\n    return sum(iterable, start)\n\ndef min_value(*args, key=None):\n    return min(*args, key=key)\n\ndef max_value(*args, key=None):\n    return max(*args, key=key)\n\n# Type and Attribute Handling\ndef type_of(obj):\n    return type(obj)\n\ndef isinstance_of(obj, classinfo):\n    return isinstance(obj, classinfo)\n\ndef print_nonl(sub):\n    return print(sub, end="")\n\ndef issubclass_of(sub, superclass):\n    return issubclass(sub, superclass)\n\ndef getattr_func(obj, name, default=None):\n    return getattr(obj, name, default)\n\ndef setattr_func(obj, name, value):\n    setattr(obj, name, value)\n\ndef hasattr_func(obj, name):\n    return hasattr(obj, name)\n\n# File and I/O\ndef open_file(filename, mode="r", buffering=-1):\n    return open(filename, mode, buffering)\n\n# Exception Handling\ndef raise_exception(exctype, msg=None):\n    if msg:\n        raise exctype(msg)\n    else:\n        raise exctype()\n\n# Miscellaneous\ndef callable_check(obj):\n    return callable(obj)\n\ndef id_func(obj):\n    return id(obj)\n\ndef help_func(obj):\n    help(obj)  # This will print the help to the standard output\n\nimport inspect\n\ndef get_str_rep(func):\n    if not inspect.isfunction(func):\n        return func\n    if func.__module__ == "__main__":\n        return func.__name__\n    return f"{func.__module__}.{func.__name__}"\n\nthe_modules_and_globals = merge_modules_and_globals()\n\n'))

the_modules_and_globals\n    local_vars = locals()\n    return eval(s,global_vars,local_vars)\n\ndef exec_string(s):\n    global the_modules_and_globals\n    global_vars = the_modules_and_globals\n    local_vars = locals()\n    return exec(s,global_vars,local_vars)\n\ndef py_nth(s,nth):\n    return s[nth]\n\ndef identity(s):\n    return s\n\ndef get_globals():\n    return globals()\n\ndef merge_modules_and_globals():\n    # Get all currently loaded modules\n    loaded_modules = sys.modules\n\n    # Get all global variables\n    global_vars = globals()\n\n    # Prepare a combined dictionary\n    global the_modules_and_globals\n    combined_dict = the_modules_and_globals\n    if combined_dict is None:\n        combined_dict = {}\n\n    # Add modules with a prefix or special key to distinguish them\n    for mod_name, mod_obj in loaded_modules.items():\n        combined_dict[f"module_{mod_name}"] = mod_obj\n        combined_dict[f"{mod_name}"] = mod_obj\n\n    # Add global variables with a prefix or special key\n    for var_name, var_value in global_vars.items():\n        combined_dict[f"global_{var_name}"] = var_value\n        combined_dict[f"{var_name}"] = var_value\n\n    the_modules_and_globals = combined_dict\n    return combined_dict\n\ndef get_locals():\n    return locals()\n\ndef iter_collection(s):\n    return iter(s)\n\ndef string_conversion(s):\n    return str(s)\n\ndef string_representation(s):\n    return repr(s)\n\ndef py_len(s):\n    return len(s)\n\ndef py_list(s):\n    return list(s)\n\ndef py_dict(s):\n    return dict(s)\n\ndef py_dict0():\n    return dict()\n\ndef py_map(s):\n    return map(s)\n\ndef py_tuple(s):\n    return tuple(s)\n\ndef py_set(s):\n    return set(s)\n\ndef absolute_value(num):\n    return abs(num)\n\ndef all_true(iterable):\n    return all(iterable)\n\ndef any_true(iterable):\n    return any(iterable)\n\ndef as_ascii(s):\n    return ascii(s)\n\ndef binary_conversion(num):\n    return bin(num)\n\ndef boolean_conversion(val):\n    return bool(val)\n\ndef chr_conversion(num):\n    return chr(num)\n\ndef hexadecimal_conversion(num):\n    return hex(num)\n\ndef octal_conversion(num):\n    return oct(num)\n\n# Arithmetic and Conversion\ndef int_conversion(s):\n    return int(s)\n\ndef float_conversion(s):\n    return float(s)\n\ndef complex_conversion(real, imag=0):\n    return complex(real, imag)\n\ndef divmod_func(a, b):\n    return divmod(a, b)\n\ndef pow_func(base, exp):\n    return pow(base, exp)\n\n# Collection Handling\ndef sorted_iterable(iterable, key=None, reverse=False):\n    return sorted(iterable, key=key, reverse=reverse)\n\ndef sum_iterable(iterable, start=0):\n    return sum(iterable, start)\n\ndef min_value(*args, key=None):\n    return min(*args, key=key)\n\ndef max_value(*args, key=None):\n    return max(*args, key=key)\n\n# Type and Attribute Handling\ndef type_of(obj):\n    return type(obj)\n\ndef isinstance_of(obj, classinfo):\n    return isinstance(obj, classinfo)\n\ndef print_nonl(sub):\n    return print(sub, end="")\n\ndef issubclass_of(sub, superclass):\n    return issubclass(sub, superclass)\n\ndef getattr_func(obj, name, default=None):\n    return getattr(obj, name, default)\n\ndef setattr_func(obj, name, value):\n    setattr(obj, name, value)\n\ndef hasattr_func(obj, name):\n    return hasattr(obj, name)\n\n# File and I/O\ndef open_file(filename, mode="r", buffering=-1):\n    return open(filename, mode, buffering)\n\n# Exception Handling\ndef raise_exception(exctype, msg=None):\n    if msg:\n        raise exctype(msg)\n    else:\n        raise exctype()\n\n# Miscellaneous\ndef callable_check(obj):\n    return callable(obj)\n\ndef id_func(obj):\n    return id(obj)\n\ndef help_func(obj):\n    help(obj)  # This will print the help to the standard output\n\nimport inspect\n\ndef get_str_rep(func):\n    if not inspect.isfunction(func):\n        return func\n    if func.__module__ == "__main__":\n        return func.__name__\n    return f"{func.__module__}.{func.__name__}"\n\nthe_modules_and_globals = merge_modules_and_globals()\n\n'))

local_vars = locals()\n    return exec(s,global_vars,local_vars)\n\ndef py_nth(s,nth):\n    return s[nth]\n\ndef identity(s):\n    return s\n\ndef get_globals():\n    return globals()\n\ndef merge_modules_and_globals():\n    # Get all currently loaded modules\n    loaded_modules = sys.modules\n\n    # Get all global variables\n    global_vars = globals()\n\n    # Prepare a combined dictionary\n    global the_modules_and_globals\n    combined_dict = the_modules_and_globals\n    if combined_dict is None:\n        combined_dict = {}\n\n    # Add modules with a prefix or special key to distinguish them\n    for mod_name, mod_obj in loaded_modules.items():\n        combined_dict[f"module_{mod_name}"] = mod_obj\n        combined_dict[f"{mod_name}"] = mod_obj\n\n    # Add global variables with a prefix or special key\n    for var_name, var_value in global_vars.items():\n        combined_dict[f"global_{var_name}"] = var_value\n        combined_dict[f"{var_name}"] = var_value\n\n    the_modules_and_globals = combined_dict\n    return combined_dict\n\ndef get_locals():\n    return locals()\n\ndef iter_collection(s):\n    return iter(s)\n\ndef string_conversion(s):\n    return str(s)\n\ndef string_representation(s):\n    return repr(s)\n\ndef py_len(s):\n    return len(s)\n\ndef py_list(s):\n    return list(s)\n\ndef py_dict(s):\n    return dict(s)\n\ndef py_dict0():\n    return dict()\n\ndef py_map(s):\n    return map(s)\n\ndef py_tuple(s):\n    return tuple(s)\n\ndef py_set(s):\n    return set(s)\n\ndef absolute_value(num):\n    return abs(num)\n\ndef all_true(iterable):\n    return all(iterable)\n\ndef any_true(iterable):\n    return any(iterable)\n\ndef as_ascii(s):\n    return ascii(s)\n\ndef binary_conversion(num):\n    return bin(num)\n\ndef boolean_conversion(val):\n    return bool(val)\n\ndef chr_conversion(num):\n    return chr(num)\n\ndef hexadecimal_conversion(num):\n    return hex(num)\n\ndef octal_conversion(num):\n    return oct(num)\n\n# Arithmetic and Conversion\ndef int_conversion(s):\n    return int(s)\n\ndef float_conversion(s):\n    return float(s)\n\ndef complex_conversion(real, imag=0):\n    return complex(real, imag)\n\ndef divmod_func(a, b):\n    return divmod(a, b)\n\ndef pow_func(base, exp):\n    return pow(base, exp)\n\n# Collection Handling\ndef sorted_iterable(iterable, key=None, reverse=False):\n    return sorted(iterable, key=key, reverse=reverse)\n\ndef sum_iterable(iterable, start=0):\n    return sum(iterable, start)\n\ndef min_value(*args, key=None):\n    return min(*args, key=key)\n\ndef max_value(*args, key=None):\n    return max(*args, key=key)\n\n# Type and Attribute Handling\ndef type_of(obj):\n    return type(obj)\n\ndef isinstance_of(obj, classinfo):\n    return isinstance(obj, classinfo)\n\ndef print_nonl(sub):\n    return print(sub, end="")\n\ndef issubclass_of(sub, superclass):\n    return issubclass(sub, superclass)\n\ndef getattr_func(obj, name, default=None):\n    return getattr(obj, name, default)\n\ndef setattr_func(obj, name, value):\n    setattr(obj, name, value)\n\ndef hasattr_func(obj, name):\n    return hasattr(obj, name)\n\n# File and I/O\ndef open_file(filename, mode="r", buffering=-1):\n    return open(filename, mode, buffering)\n\n# Exception Handling\ndef raise_exception(exctype, msg=None):\n    if msg:\n        raise exctype(msg)\n    else:\n        raise exctype()\n\n# Miscellaneous\ndef callable_check(obj):\n    return callable(obj)\n\ndef id_func(obj):\n    return id(obj)\n\ndef help_func(obj):\n    help(obj)  # This will print the help to the standard output\n\nimport inspect\n\ndef get_str_rep(func):\n    if not inspect.isfunction(func):\n        return func\n    if func.__module__ == "__main__":\n        return func.__name__\n    return f"{func.__module__}.{func.__name__}"\n\nthe_modules_and_globals = merge_modules_and_globals()\n\n')

   global_vars = the_modules_and_globals\n    local_vars = locals()\n    return eval(s,global_vars,local_vars)\n\ndef exec_string(s):\n    global the_modules_and_globals\n    global_vars = the_modules_and_globals\n    local_vars = locals()\n    return exec(s,global_vars,local_vars)\n\ndef py_nth(s,nth):\n    return s[nth]\n\ndef identity(s):\n    return s\n\ndef get_globals():\n    return globals()\n\ndef merge_modules_and_globals():\n    # Get all currently loaded modules\n    loaded_modules = sys.modules\n\n    # Get all global variables\n    global_vars = globals()\n\n    # Prepare a combined dictionary\n    global the_modules_and_globals\n    combined_dict = the_modules_and_globals\n    if combined_dict is None:\n        combined_dict = {}\n\n    # Add modules with a prefix or special key to distinguish them\n    for mod_name, mod_obj in loaded_modules.items():\n        combined_dict[f"module_{mod_name}"] = mod_obj\n        combined_dict[f"{mod_name}"] = mod_obj\n\n    # Add global variables with a prefix or special key\n    for var_name, var_value in global_vars.items():\n        combined_dict[f"global_{var_name}"] = var_value\n        combined_dict[f"{var_name}"] = var_value\n\n    the_modules_and_globals = combined_dict\n    return combined_dict\n\ndef get_locals():\n    return locals()\n\ndef iter_collection(s):\n    return iter(s)\n\ndef string_conversion(s):\n    return str(s)\n\ndef string_representation(s):\n    return repr(s)\n\ndef py_len(s):\n    return len(s)\n\ndef py_list(s):\n    return list(s)\n\ndef py_dict(s):\n    return dict(s)\n\ndef py_dict0():\n    return dict()\n\ndef py_map(s):\n    return map(s)\n\ndef py_tuple(s):\n    return tuple(s)\n\ndef py_set(s):\n    return set(s)\n\ndef absolute_value(num):\n    return abs(num)\n\ndef all_true(iterable):\n    return all(iterable)\n\ndef any_true(iterable):\n    return any(iterable)\n\ndef as_ascii(s):\n    return ascii(s)\n\ndef binary_conversion(num):\n    return bin(num)\n\ndef boolean_conversion(val):\n    return bool(val)\n\ndef chr_conversion(num):\n    return chr(num)\n\ndef hexadecimal_conversion(num):\n    return hex(num)\n\ndef octal_conversion(num):\n    return oct(num)\n\n# Arithmetic and Conversion\ndef int_conversion(s):\n    return int(s)\n\ndef float_conversion(s):\n    return float(s)\n\ndef complex_conversion(real, imag=0):\n    return complex(real, imag)\n\ndef divmod_func(a, b):\n    return divmod(a, b)\n\ndef pow_func(base, exp):\n    return pow(base, exp)\n\n# Collection Handling\ndef sorted_iterable(iterable, key=None, reverse=False):\n    return sorted(iterable, key=key, reverse=reverse)\n\ndef sum_iterable(iterable, start=0):\n    return sum(iterable, start)\n\ndef min_value(*args, key=None):\n    return min(*args, key=key)\n\ndef max_value(*args, key=None):\n    return max(*args, key=key)\n\n# Type and Attribute Handling\ndef type_of(obj):\n    return type(obj)\n\ndef isinstance_of(obj, classinfo):\n    return isinstance(obj, classinfo)\n\ndef print_nonl(sub):\n    return print(sub, end="")\n\ndef issubclass_of(sub, superclass):\n    return issubclass(sub, superclass)\n\ndef getattr_func(obj, name, default=None):\n    return getattr(obj, name, default)\n\ndef setattr_func(obj, name, value):\n    setattr(obj, name, value)\n\ndef hasattr_func(obj, name):\n    return hasattr(obj, name)\n\n# File and I/O\ndef open_file(filename, mode="r", buffering=-1):\n    return open(filename, mode, buffering)\n\n# Exception Handling\ndef raise_exception(exctype, msg=None):\n    if msg:\n        raise exctype(msg)\n    else:\n        raise exctype()\n\n# Miscellaneous\ndef callable_check(obj):\n    return callable(obj)\n\ndef id_func(obj):\n    return id(obj)\n\ndef help_func(obj):\n    help(obj)  # This will print the help to the standard output\n\nimport inspect\n\ndef get_str_rep(func):\n    if not inspect.isfunction(func):\n        return func\n    if func.__module__ == "__main__":\n        return func.__name__\n    return f"{func.__module__}.{func.__name__}"\n\nthe_modules_and_globals = merge_modules_and_globals()\n\n'))

dictionary\n    global the_modules_and_globals\n    combined_dict = the_modules_and_globals\n    if combined_dict is None:\n        combined_dict = {}\n\n    # Add modules with a prefix or special key to distinguish them\n    for mod_name, mod_obj in loaded_modules.items():\n        combined_dict[f"module_{mod_name}"] = mod_obj\n        combined_dict[f"{mod_name}"] = mod_obj\n\n    # Add global variables with a prefix or special key\n    for var_name, var_value in global_vars.items():\n        combined_dict[f"global_{var_name}"] = var_value\n        combined_dict[f"{var_name}"] = var_value\n\n    the_modules_and_globals = combined_dict\n    return combined_dict\n\ndef get_locals():\n    return locals()\n\ndef iter_collection(s):\n    return iter(s)\n\ndef string_conversion(s):\n    return str(s)\n\ndef string_representation(s):\n    return repr(s)\n\ndef py_len(s):\n    return len(s)\n\ndef py_list(s):\n    return list(s)\n\ndef py_dict(s):\n    return dict(s)\n\ndef py_dict0():\n    return dict()\n\ndef py_map(s):\n    return map(s)\n\ndef py_tuple(s):\n    return tuple(s)\n\ndef py_set(s):\n    return set(s)\n\ndef absolute_value(num):\n    return abs(num)\n\ndef all_true(iterable):\n    return all(iterable)\n\ndef any_true(iterable):\n    return any(iterable)\n\ndef as_ascii(s):\n    return ascii(s)\n\ndef binary_conversion(num):\n    return bin(num)\n\ndef boolean_conversion(val):\n    return bool(val)\n\ndef chr_conversion(num):\n    return chr(num)\n\ndef hexadecimal_conversion(num):\n    return hex(num)\n\ndef octal_conversion(num):\n    return oct(num)\n\n# Arithmetic and Conversion\ndef int_conversion(s):\n    return int(s)\n\ndef float_conversion(s):\n    return float(s)\n\ndef complex_conversion(real, imag=0):\n    return complex(real, imag)\n\ndef divmod_func(a, b):\n    return divmod(a, b)\n\ndef pow_func(base, exp):\n    return pow(base, exp)\n\n# Collection Handling\ndef sorted_iterable(iterable, key=None, reverse=False):\n    return sorted(iterable, key=key, reverse=reverse)\n\ndef sum_iterable(iterable, start=0):\n    return sum(iterable, start)\n\ndef min_value(*args, key=None):\n    return min(*args, key=key)\n\ndef max_value(*args, key=None):\n    return max(*args, key=key)\n\n# Type and Attribute Handling\ndef type_of(obj):\n    return type(obj)\n\ndef isinstance_of(obj, classinfo):\n name, default=None):\n    return getattr(obj, name, default)\n\ndef setattr_func(obj, name, value):\n    setattr(obj, name, value)\n\ndef hasattr_func(obj, name):\n    return hasattr(obj, name)\n\n# File and I/O\ndef open_file(filename, mode="r", buffering=-1):\n    return open(filename, mode, buffering)\n\n# Exception Handling\ndef raise_exception(exctype, msg=None):\n    if msg:\n        raise
